basic_details.job_title: SVPNPA Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Staff Nurse, Laboratory Technician and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel National Police Academy (SVPNPA)
basic_details.post_name: Staff Nurse, Laboratory Technician, X-Ray Technician

age_limit.details: All Posts: Maximum age limit is 56 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Staff Nurse or Nursing Officer, B.Sc (Medical Lab Technology) or equivalent, Analogous post with service in Level-4
qualification.details: Staff Nurse: Officers holding the post of Staff Nurse or Nursing officer under the Central Government, State Governments or Union-territory Administration: (a) holding analogous post on regular basis in the parent cadre or Department; or (b) with five years regular service in the post rendered, after appointment thereto on regular basis in level-6 (Rs. 35400-112400) in the pay matrix or equivalent in the parent cadre or Department. Laboratory Technician: Officers of the Central Government or State Government or Union Territory Administrations: (i) Holding analogous post on regular basis in the parent cadre or department; or (ii) With six years of regular service in the grade rendered after appointment thereto on a regular basis in level-5 in the pay matrix (Rs. 29200-92300) or equivalent in the parent cadre or department; and Educational Qualification: (i) B.Sc (Medical Lab Technology) from a recognised Institution or University or (ii) B.Sc (Physics or Chemistry or Mathematics or Biology) with diploma (Medical lab Technology) from a recognised Institution or University; or (iii) B.Tech (Bio Technology) from a recognised University or Institution. X-Ray Technician: Officers under the Central Government or State Government or Union territory or Autonomous Bodies or Public Sector Undertaking or Statutory Bodies or Recognised Research Institutes or Universities and Semi Government organisations: (i) Holding analogous posts in the Parent Cadre with three years regular service in the level-4.

salary_details.details: Staff Nurse: Level-7 Laboratory Technician: Level-6 X-Ray Technician: Level-4 (Rs.25500-81100)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SVPNPA Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://www.svpnpa.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SVPNPA recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the SVPNPA recruitment is 21st June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Staff Nurse, Laboratory Technician, and X-Ray Technician posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced by SVPNPA. These include 1 post for Staff Nurse, 2 posts for Laboratory Technician, and 1 post for X-Ray Technician.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Laboratory Technician post?
faq.answer: For the Laboratory Technician post, candidates need a B.Sc in Medical Lab Technology or equivalent. Alternatively, a B.Sc in Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, or Biology with a diploma in Medical Lab Technology is also accepted.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the SVPNPA recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this SVPNPA recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts under this SVPNPA recruitment is 56 years. There is no mention of age relaxation for specific categories.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for the SVPNPA recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the Staff Nurse post?
faq.answer: The Staff Nurse post is offered a salary in Level-7 of the pay matrix. This indicates a competitive salary package as per government norms.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these deputation posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts is based on deputation. Candidates will be selected based on their eligibility and service records as per the deputation rules.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel National Police Academy (SVPNPA), which is http://www.svpnpa.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to attach self-attested copies of necessary documents, including photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates, as specified in the official notification.
